comment:
REVIEW FINDING: NON-COMPLIANT. Requirement text in all five detail sections is truncated compared to the RS. The RTM must faithfully reproduce the requirement text to establish traceability.

DEFICIENCY 1 - REQ-REPO-001 (line 41): RTM states 'The repository shall contain a .claude-qms marker file at the root.' RS states 'The repository shall contain a .claude-qms marker file at the root. This file signals to qms init that the directory is a valid QMS project root.' Missing second sentence.

DEFICIENCY 2 - REQ-REPO-002 (line 49): RTM states 'The repository shall include qms-cli/ as a git submodule pointing to whharris917/qms-cli.' RS states 'The repository shall include qms-cli/ as a git submodule pointing to whharris917/qms-cli. The submodule shall reference a qualified commit on the main branch.' Missing second sentence. Note: the evidence (line 51) also does not address whether the submodule references a qualified commit on main -- only that the submodule exists.

DEFICIENCY 3 - REQ-REPO-003 (line 57): RTM states 'The repository shall contain a .gitignore file that excludes QMS runtime artifacts.' RS states 'The repository shall contain a .gitignore file that excludes QMS runtime artifacts (e.g., .claude/users/, QMS/.meta/, QMS/.audit/, QMS/.archive/, __pycache__/).' Missing parenthetical examples. (Evidence on line 59 does list the specific exclusions, so the evidence is adequate -- but the requirement text should match.)

DEFICIENCY 4 - REQ-DOC-001 (line 67): RTM states 'The repository shall contain a README.md with quick-start instructions.' RS states 'The repository shall contain a README.md with quick-start instructions covering: cloning with --recurse-submodules, running qms init, and basic QMS CLI usage.' Missing the specific coverage items. (Evidence on line 69 does address the specifics.)

DEFICIENCY 5 - REQ-DOC-002 (line 75): RTM states 'The repository shall NOT contain any files created by qms init.' RS states 'The repository shall NOT contain any files that are created by qms init (e.g., QMS/, .claude/users/, CLAUDE.md, qms.config.json). These are generated at init time from qms-cli/seed/.' Missing examples and second sentence. (Evidence on line 77 does list the specific files.)

ITEMS VERIFIED AS COMPLIANT:
- Frontmatter title: 'claude-qms Requirements Traceability Matrix'
- Frontmatter revision_summary: 'CR-104: Initial RTM for the claude-qms canonical starter repository'
- RS version reference: 'SDLC-CQ-RS v1.0' in Purpose (line 10) and Scope (line 16) -- consistent forward reference
- Qualified baseline: commit 6b22747 on main branch of whharris917/claude-qms (real value, not TBD)
- Scope: 5 requirements, 3 REQ-REPO + 2 REQ-DOC -- matches summary table (5 rows)
- Summary matrix: All 5 requirements present with Inspection method and PASS result
- Evidence specificity: Each evidence section references concrete artifacts at commit 6b22747
- No placeholder content (TBD/TODO/FIXME/XXX): None found
- Formatting: Consistent throughout

ADDITIONAL NOTE on DEFICIENCY 2: Beyond the text mismatch, the evidence for REQ-REPO-002 should also verify that the submodule references a qualified commit on main, per the full RS requirement text. Currently the evidence only confirms the submodule exists and points to the correct URL.

Correct all five requirement text truncations and strengthen REQ-REPO-002 evidence to address the qualified-commit-on-main clause. Then re-route for review.

Re-review following correction of five deficiencies from prior cycle. All five fixes verified with evidence:

FIX 1 VERIFIED - REQ-REPO-001 (line 41): Now includes full text: 'The repository shall contain a .claude-qms marker file at the root. This file signals to qms init that the directory is a valid QMS project root.' Exact match with RS line 32.

FIX 2 VERIFIED - REQ-REPO-002 (line 49): Now includes full text: 'The repository shall include qms-cli/ as a git submodule pointing to whharris917/qms-cli. The submodule shall reference a qualified commit on the main branch.' Exact match with RS line 33. Evidence (line 51) strengthened to identify specific qms-cli commit 54708d2 on main as the qualified baseline.

FIX 3 VERIFIED - REQ-REPO-003 (line 57): Now includes parenthetical examples '(e.g., .claude/users/, QMS/.meta/, QMS/.audit/, QMS/.archive/, __pycache__/)'. Exact match with RS line 34.

FIX 4 VERIFIED - REQ-DOC-001 (line 67): Now includes 'covering: cloning with --recurse-submodules, running qms init, and basic QMS CLI usage'. Exact match with RS line 42.

FIX 5 VERIFIED - REQ-DOC-002 (line 75): Now includes '(e.g., QMS/, .claude/users/, CLAUDE.md, qms.config.json). These are generated at init time from qms-cli/seed/.' Exact match with RS line 43.

Previously verified items re-confirmed unchanged:
- Frontmatter title: 'claude-qms Requirements Traceability Matrix'
- Frontmatter revision_summary: 'CR-104: Initial RTM for the claude-qms canonical starter repository'
- RS version reference: SDLC-CQ-RS v1.0 in Purpose and Scope (consistent)
- Qualified baseline: commit 6b22747 on main branch of whharris917/claude-qms (real value, not TBD)
- Scope: 5 requirements, 3 REQ-REPO + 2 REQ-DOC (correct)
- Summary matrix: 5 rows, all Inspection method, all PASS
- No placeholder content (TBD/TODO/FIXME/XXX)
- Formatting consistent throughout

COMPLIANT. Recommend for approval.
